title: Biden to meet with China's Xi in person at G-20 summit
description: President Joe Biden will meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping on the sidelines of next week’s Group of 20 Summit in Bali, Indonesia, the White House
snippet: WASHINGTON — President Joe Biden will meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping on the sidelines of next week’s Group of 20 Summit in Bali, Indonesia, the Whit...
